title: Executions queuing due to command variable conflict
symptom: Executions in n8n are entering an eternal queue, and workflows are stopped. The user is unable to run any workflows.
not_this_if: Single command variable is set correctly
root_cause: The issue arises when multiple command variables are set to the same value in the Docker configuration, causing conflicts in how n8n processes executions. This prevents the system from properly handling workflow executions.
fix_steps: Open the Docker configuration file for n8n
Ensure that each command variable is unique and correctly set
Restart the n8n service to apply changes
agent_instruction: Check and correct the command variables in the Docker configuration to ensure they are unique.
